user.title: Dangbei Projector
user.description: Select a discovered projector from the list, or choose 'Manual input' and enter the IP address below.

confirm.title: Device Discovered

projector_confirm.title: Projector Found

setup.title: Optional Settings
setup.description: Optionally configure a companion ESP32 wake-up device (esp32-dangbei-wol) to support remote power-on.

zeroconf_confirm.title: ESP32 wake-up device found
zeroconf_confirm.description: Discovered an ESP32 Dangbei wake-up device at {host} (id: {id}). Continue to configure the projector connection.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach projector WebSocket. Check the IP and that the projector is powered on.
error.host_required: Please enter the projector IP address or select a discovered projector.
error.wol_cannot_connect: Cannot reach the ESP32 wake-up device. Check its IP / port / token.

abort.incomplete_device_info: Discovered device is missing required information.
